message:
refactor(codegen): Use operator_traits for modulo/floor-div semantics

Apply operator_traits.getModuloSemantics() and getFloorDivSemantics() to:
- comprehensions.zig: List comprehension condition modulo handling
- aug_assign.zig: Augmented assignment (x %= y, x //= y) operators

This ensures correct Python semantics for float operands:
- Integer operands: use @mod/@divFloor (Zig native)
- Float operands: use runtime.pyFloatMod/@floor(a/b) (Python floored)
- Unknown types: use runtime dispatch helpers
